mapper.select: select * from guestbook where g_active = 0 order by g_idx desc
select * from guestbook where g_idx = #{g_idx} and g_active = 0
mapper.insert: insert into guestbook(g_writer, g_subject, g_content, g_email, g_pwd, g_regdate) values(#{g_writer}, #{g_subject}, #{g_content}, #{g_email}, #{g_pwd}, now())
mapper.update: update guestbook set g_active = 1 where g_idx = #{g_idx}
